name: agile-ia-assistant
description: Assistant de gestion de projet agile avec IA — MSc eBIHAR (ESTIA)
author: SANDAMAHERY Sahy Liana

scripts.dev: echo 'Use: npm run dev -w apps/api | npm run dev -w apps/web' && exit 1
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm test -w apps/api && npm test -w apps/web
